title: Added Local Docs Management Workflow Smoke
summary: Added a fixture-backed smoke test that runs the local Studio app server against a temporary repo and exercises the main Docs management API workflow routes through /studio/api/docs.
effect: Phase 3 now has direct evidence that the local app server can call Docs management domain functions for create, metadata update, move, archive, delete preview/apply, source-config settings, import listing, and rebuild route families without proxying to the old docs-management HTTP service.
verification: tests/smoke/local_studio_docs_management_workflows.py passed against a temporary fixture repo
